must_detect.matched_text:
NỘI BỘ — KHÔNG CÔNG BỐ TRƯỚC 15/06/2026 09:00 ICT — Internal Legal Brief re: Project PADDYLANE (LRP).
Lantern River Power JSC (“LRP”) to enter into definitive Share Subscription Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement with Crescent Banyan Fund I for a VND 1,250,000,000,000 private placement representing ~12.5% post‑money.
Board memo: Resolution 06‑2026/LRP (12/06/2026) approved in principle, subject to National Capital Markets Authority (NCMA‑VN) registration and Saigon Main Board (SMB) disclosure under Listing Rule 7.4 (fictional).
Non‑public markers: Draft IR copy and draft term sheet attached; EMBARGO until 15/06/2026 09:00 ICT; working group code name “PADDYLANE”.
Conditions precedent include: NCMA‑VN acceptance notice, SMB pre‑clear, bank KYC files, and a Material Adverse Effect clause as follows.
MAC/MAE: No MAE shall be deemed to occur solely due to changes in VN base rate set by the People’s Monetary Board (PMB‑VN) or sector‑wide tariff updates publicly announced; for clarity, an MAE is not triggered by general inflation or weather‑related curtailment disclosed in routine reports.
Funds to be wired into escrow at Amber River Bank Vietnam (fict), acct 00 1 98‑L R P‑ 2 04 7, ref “P‑L A N E  15/06”; signatories: Mr. Vũ Đăng Hà and Ms. Lê Thu An.
Privacy/PII: circulation limited to named employees only (Emp l oyee ID LRP‑e0 77, LRP‑c3  14); processed per Privacy Decree 13‑β and LRP Policy PR‑2026‑01 (fictional).
Draft investor‑relations text (not for release): “Subject to NCMA‑VN approvals, LRP will issue 62,500,000 new shares at VND 20,000; Board may consider dividend policy update in Q4 2026”; file: https://ir.lanternriver.vn/dataroom?p=paddylane&id=LRP-2%201%209A-x7.
Preliminary research note (draft, non‑public): FY2026E EBITDA VND 810bn; pro‑forma net debt/EBITDA 2.9x; expected dilution 11.1%; target gearing 55% by FY2027.
Deal checklist excerpt: SSA (definitive), SHA, escrow agreement, auditor comfort letter, UBO declaration (NCMA‑VN Form 88D), anti‑corruption certificate, SMB price‑sensitive notice temp
